warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
3x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
Hold 3 Sets
06:00 4 @ 70%
09:00 4 @ 70%
12:00 4 @ 70%

metcon.name: Goose
metcon.description:
For time with a partner:
106 deadlifts
Then, 7 rounds of:
3 rope climbs
15 thrusters
15 kettlebell swings
Then, 400-meter run with a plate (*Both partners carry a plate.)
F: 95-lb barbell, 15-foot rope, 53-lb kettlebell, 25-lb plate
M: 135-lb barbell, 15-foot rope, 70-lb kettlebell, 45-lb plate

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and thrusters dominate posterior chain and legs; accessory work targets upper body push/pull balance.

raw_text:

10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL
Deadlift | 3x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket

Hold 3 Sets
06:00 4 @ 70%
09:00 4 @ 70%
12:00 4 @ 70%
Goose | For time with a partner:
106 deadlifts
Then, 7 rounds of:
3 rope climbs
15 thrusters
15 kettlebell swings
Then, 400-meter run with a plate (*Both partners carry a plate.)
F: 95-lb barbell, 15-foot rope, 53-lb kettlebell, 25-lb plate

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 3 by 4 at 70 percent. Metcon: Goose. For Time: 106 deadlifts, 3 rope climbs, 15 thrusters, 15 kettlebell swings. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (anterior/lateral), arms (biceps/triceps).
